name: SSC – Group B & Group C – 12256 Posts
qualification: Any Graduate, Any Bachelors Degree, MBA/PGDM

basic_details.job_title: SSC CGL Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 12256 Group B & Group C Posts
basic_details.short_information: SSC CGL Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 12256 vacancies for Group B & Group C vacancies across India. Candidates can apply online only from 21.05.2026 to 22.06.2026 through SSC website ssc.gov.in.
basic_details.post_name: Various Group B (Gazetted/Non-Gazetted) and Group C posts including Assistant Section Officer, Inspector (IT/CE), Sub Inspector (CBI/NIA), Junior Statistical Officer, Assistant Audit Officer, Tax Assistant, Auditor, Accountant, Postal Assistant, and more
basic_details.application_mode: Online only at https://ssc.gov.in or via mY SSC mobile app

age_limit.age_details: Vocabulary, grammar, synonyms, antonyms, idioms, sentence improvement, comprehension passages (current affairs + editorial based)

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree from a recognized University or equivalent for most posts, as on 01-08-2026.

salary_details.pay_scale: Pay Level 4 (Rs. 25,500–81,100) to Pay Level 8 (Rs. 47,600–1,51,100) depending on the post

how_to_apply: Candidates must apply online only at https://ssc.gov.in or through the mY SSC mobile application (available on Google Play Store). No other mode of application is accepted. Candidates who have not generated OTR on the new website must do so first. Once OTR is generated on the new website, it remains valid for all future examinations on that portal.
seo_tags: Staff Selection Commission Group B & Group C Recruitment 2026
